name: mcp-server-aws-cdk
description: AWS CDK best practices, infrastructure patterns, and security compliance with CDK Nag

rating.reason: The toolset shows adequate documentation with significant inconsistencies. Some tools like 'ExplainCDKNagRule' provide comprehensive descriptions with usage examples, while others like 'CDKGeneralGuidance' have minimal descriptions. Parameter documentation is basic but functional across most tools. Two tools are marked as deprecated which reduces overall utility. Names are generally clear and purposeful.
